name: hscan
documentation:
# Hscan

```
python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel
python -m twine upload dist/*
user __token__
```

methods.name: scan.core.spiders.spider.Spider.site
documentation:
1. 可以对配置文件进行修改
eg：
    self.config.config.set('client', 'task_num', 1)
:return:
2. 可以设置新的成员变量
eg:
    self.mq2 = ''

methods.name: scan.core.spiders.spider.Spider.init
documentation:
初始化数据处理连接
eg:
    mq_config = self.config.rabbitmq()
    self.rabbitmq = RabbitMQ(host=mq_config.get('host'), port=mq_config.get('port'), user=mq_config.get('user'),
                   password=mq_config.get('password'))
    await self.rabbitmq.init()
:return:
